analysis.reasoning: Core message: Zakharova accuses Poland/Warsaw of selfishly undermining fair competition and harming European energy and environmental security regarding Nord Stream 2. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Yes. The tweet portrays a Western ally (Poland) as acting selfishly, ignoring fair principles and consumers, and undermining security—depicting hostility/immorality. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system) – Not present; no promotion of Russia-led multilateralism. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner) – Not asserted; focus is on Poland’s wrongdoing, not Russia’s benevolence. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the forefront) – Not claimed. RU6 (Russia culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
